title: toxicoscordion fremontii var. minor
intro: Toxicoscordion fremontii var. minor, also known as Fremont's deathcamas or minor deathcamas, is a plant species belonging to the lily family (Liliaceae) and is native to the southwestern United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Toxicoscordion fremontii var. minor include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as providing relief from pain and inflammation. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and bulbs are often dried and made into teas, tinctures, or infusions for medicinal use.
